seed_data.title: Banana Bright Face Primer

recall.retrieval_summary: It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup.
recall.retrieval_body:
It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup. Meet Banana Bright Face Primer, the vitamin C-powered illuminating makeup primer that delivers instant radiance while improving and extending makeup wear. With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

A vitamin C enriched makeup primer that improves and extends makeup wear, blurs pores and blemishes, hydrates and instantly brightens.

seed_data.title: Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment

recall.retrieval_summary: This lip treatment goes beyond hydration. Over time, our lips lose their naturally full, soft look.
recall.retrieval_body:
This lip treatment goes beyond hydration. Over time, our lips lose their naturally full, soft look. This ultra-nourishing lip treatment visibly counteracts this volume loss, restores bounce and smoothes fine lip lines. The active formula is clinically tested to give you softer, bouncier, fuller-looking lips in just one week*. Highly-targeted, lip-specific peptides support lip's natural shape and encourage a fuller appearance, while kokum butter, mango seed butter and cloudberry oil help plump lips with hydration. The result? Softer, bouncier younger-looking lips. *In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people

An advanced lip treatment, with skin - strengthening peptides and kokum butter, that instantly plumps lip with hydration and smoothes fine lines. Award winner for 2023 PEOPLE's Beauty Awards: Best Lip Treatment.

snapshot.pdp_how_to_use_raw:
Swipe onto lips for an instant boost of hydration that lasts.

snapshot.pdp_description_raw:
This lip treatment goes beyond hydration.
Over time, our lips lose their naturally full, soft look. This ultra-nourishing lip treatment visibly counteracts this volume loss, restores bounce and smoothes fine lip lines. The active formula is clinically tested to give you softer, bouncier, fuller-looking lips in just one week*.

Highly-targeted, lip-specific peptides support lip's natural shape and encourage a fuller appearance, while kokum butter, mango seed butter and cloudberry oil help plump lips with hydration.

The result? Softer, bouncier younger-looking lips.

*In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people

seed_data.pdp_how_to_use_raw:
Swipe onto lips for an instant boost of hydration that lasts.

Glow Tip: Use after lip color for added shine!
seed_data.pdp_description_raw:
This lip treatment goes beyond hydration.
Over time, our lips lose their naturally full, soft look. This ultra-nourishing lip treatment visibly counteracts this volume loss, restores bounce and smoothes fine lip lines. The active formula is clinically tested to give you softer, bouncier, fuller-looking lips in just one week*.

Highly-targeted, lip-specific peptides support lip's natural shape and encourage a fuller appearance, while kokum butter, mango seed butter and cloudberry oil help plump lips with hydration.

The result? Softer, bouncier younger-looking lips.

*In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people

You'll look forward to applying Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment - it has a smooth-gliding, luxuriously juicy texture and naturally derived citrus scent.

Restores bounce & suppleness

97% agree it enhances the look of lips

*In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people

pdp_details_sections.heading: Details
pdp_details_sections.body:
This lip treatment goes beyond hydration.
Over time, our lips lose their naturally full, soft look. This ultra-nourishing lip treatment visibly counteracts this volume loss, restores bounce and smoothes fine lip lines. The active formula is clinically tested to give you softer, bouncier, fuller-looking lips in just one week*.

Highly-targeted, lip-specific peptides support lip's natural shape and encourage a fuller appearance, while kokum butter, mango seed butter and cloudberry oil help plump lips with hydration.

The result? Softer, bouncier younger-looking lips.

*In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people

pdp_details_sections.heading: How to Use
pdp_details_sections.body:
Swipe onto lips for an instant boost of hydration that lasts.

Glow Tip: Use after lip color for added shine!
